remarks: **THANK YOU FOR YOUR INTEREST. SELLER REQUESTS HIGHEST/BEST OFFERS BEFORE MONDAY 6/15/26 AT 4PM**Incredibly located moments from downtown, Winslow Park, commuting routes, schools, beaches & more, this grand home on an acre of landscaped property with a stunning gunite pool is ready to exceed your expectations. This sun-splashed home blends the best of a traditional Colonial with modern flair. The double-height foyer opens to the LR w/ the 1st of two fireplaces and the dining rm. The updated gourmet kitchen has a generous breakfast rm w/ French doors, new induction cooktop, backsplash & Taj Mahal quartzite counters, a Sub Zero & plenty of storage/pantry space - all leading into the magnificent Great Room which is a signature feature of this home. This soaring space has room to host any size gathering or to simply relax in stylish surroundings w/the 2nd fireplace, built-ins, a wet bar & more. All 5 BRs have en-suite baths, beginning w/ one on the main level which is highly-sought-after. Upstairs, the primary BR suite has built-ins, lrg clsts, a private office, a vltd ceil bth w/dual vanities. Each remaining BR is spacious. The third flr is finished and incl a full bth. The vast finished LL has a rec/play rm, gym, office/lib, half bth & amazing mudroom/sporting equipment storage rm. A three car garage & ample storage complete the interior. Outside, a party-sized deck leads to the level backyard w/room to run and to the fenced-in, htd pool & waterfall spa.
